title: Executive Order 5532—Modification of Reservoir-Site Reserve No. 1, Wenatchee Lake Reservoir, Washington
text:
The Executive order of January 17, 1911, creating Reservoir-Site Reserve No. 1, is hereby modified to the extent of authorizing the Federal Power Commission to issue a license for Project No. 1129, on the following described lands:
Willamette Meridian
T. 27 N., R. 16 E., sec. 10.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
January 15, 1931.
